name: Solo / Air - 3-in-1 Adapter
summary: The Arizer Solo / Air 3-in-1 adapter is a versatile attachment made from durable borosilicate glass.
description: The Arizer Solo / Air 3-in-1 adapter is a versatile attachment made from durable borosilicate glass. It allows users to connect their Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser to a water pipe or bubbler for a smoother experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
